articles.full_text:
Andhra Pradesh weather update: Thunderstorms, light rain alert for several districts; Rayalasema to sizzle at 44°C
Amaravati: Thunderstorms accompanied by lightning, gusty winds with speed reaching upto 30-40 kmph is likely at some places in Noarth Coastal AP, Yanam, Rayalaseema, IMD Amaravati said in its forecast.
However, hot, humid and discomfort weather conditions will prevail in some other districts in coastal AP and Yanam till April 26, according to IMD. Maximum temperatures are likely to be around 42-44 degrees Celsius.
As per AP State Disaster Management Authority, there is a possibility of scattered light rains accompanied by thunder in Kurnool, Nandyal, Prakasam, and Markapuram districts while moderate rain is likely in Alluri Sitaramaraju and Anakapalli districts in the next three hours.
ఏపీలో పలు జిల్లాలకు పిడుగుపాటు హెచ్చరిక 🔴 రాగల మూడు గంటల్లో అల్లూరి సీతారామరాజు, అనకాపల్లి జిల్లాల్లో అక్కడక్కడ పిడుగులతో కూడిన మోస్తరు వర్షాలు కురిసే అవకాశం 🟡 కర్నూలు, నంద్యాల, ప్రకాశం, మార్కాపురం జిల్లాల్లో అక్కడక్కడ పిడుగులతో కూడిన తేలికపాటి వర్షాలు కురిసే అవకాశం pic.twitter.com/9WhXSumNoG — Andhra Pradesh State Disaster Management Authority (@APSDMA) April 22, 2026
Weather inference:
The trough/wind discontinuity runs from Marathwada to Comorin across Interior Karnataka, Rayalaseema, Tamilnadu at 0.9 km above mean sea level. An upper air cyclonic circulation lies over North Tamilnadu and neighbourhood at 1.5 km above mean sea level.
Similar weather conditions are likely in Telangana till April 27, as per IMD Hyderabad weather forecast.
